best_window: Early morning to late morning before wind builds
report_text: Viz is currently sitting around 10-14 ft. Primary swell is around 2.7 ft @ 14s from SSW, enough to stir the shallows and keep the edges moving. Wind tops out near 9 mph, enough to add some afternoon bump but not totally wreck the day. Workable, but expect some haze and pick your entry carefully. Stay safe out there divers.
